# argo-workflows

> argo-workflows is a Kubernetes component. deploying 2 workload(s) (the-deployment, the-deployment) with 2 container(s). exposing 2 service(s) on ports: 8666. Dockerfile EXPOSE ports: 4222, 5000, 7777, 8080, 8222. connecting to external services: azure-blob, gcs, grpc, kafka, minio, mysql, postgres, redis, s3, sqlite. runtime dependencies: MinIO/S3, MongoDB, MySQL, NATS, OpenTelemetry Collector, PostgreSQL, ame. defining 6 API spec type(s) across 139 struct(s) with 562 total fields. with 6 operator config constants. exposing 44 Prometheus metrics. reporting 7 status condition types. Python k8s client with 93 API call(s). integrates with management relationship via labels/annotations.
